summary: BLOCK 472 & 473: Multi-Environment Auth Handler & Great Disconnect Migration - All features verified. Backend API tests (11/11 passed). Frontend admin UI fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: BLOCK 472 VERIFIED: GET /api/discogs/oauth/start uses Origin header for dynamic callback URL detection (lines 960-967 in collection.py)
BLOCK 472 VERIFIED: OAuth start includes enhanced error logging with callback_url info
BLOCK 472 VERIFIED: OAuth callback uses stored callback_origin for dynamic redirect (lines 1125-1128)
BLOCK 473 VERIFIED: POST /api/admin/great-disconnect endpoint is admin-only (returns 403 for non-admin)
BLOCK 473 VERIFIED: Great disconnect resets users (discogs_username=null, has_seen_security_migration=false, discogs_oauth_verified=false)
BLOCK 473 VERIFIED: Great disconnect deletes all discogs_tokens
BLOCK 473 VERIFIED: Great disconnect sets active listings to HIDDEN_PENDING_VERIFICATION status
BLOCK 473 VERIFIED: Great disconnect returns counts (users_reset, tokens_deleted, listings_hidden)
BLOCK 473 VERIFIED: OAuth callback auto-restores HIDDEN_PENDING_VERIFICATION listings after successful verification (lines 1114-1119)
BLOCK 472/473 FRONTEND VERIFIED: Admin Settings shows 'The Great Disconnect' card with red title
BLOCK 472/473 FRONTEND VERIFIED: Confirmation dialog appears when clicking 'Run Great Disconnect'
BLOCK 472/473 FRONTEND VERIFIED: Result panel displays users_reset, tokens_deleted, listings_hidden after execution
BLOCK 472/473 FRONTEND VERIFIED: Success toast 'Great Disconnect migration complete' appears after execution
DEPRECATED ENDPOINT VERIFIED: POST /api/discogs/connect-token returns 400 'Manual Discogs connection is no longer supported'
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin and test user accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 472/473 fully verified. The Great Disconnect migration has been executed multiple times (idempotent - returns 0 counts since data already purged). OAuth flow correctly uses Origin header for dynamic callback URL. Key files: collection.py (lines 950-1135 for OAuth and great-disconnect endpoints), great_disconnect.py script, AdminPage.js SettingsSection (lines 1095-1135). The HIDDEN_PENDING_VERIFICATION listing status is used by great disconnect and restored by OAuth callback.

oauth_start_dynamic_callback.details: GET /api/discogs/oauth/start uses request.headers.get('origin') for dynamic callback URL

oauth_start_error_logging.details: Enhanced logging includes callback_url on error

great_disconnect_token_purge.details: Deletes all records from discogs_tokens collection

great_disconnect_listing_hide.details: Sets ACTIVE listings to HIDDEN_PENDING_VERIFICATION with hidden_reason='great_disconnect_migration'

oauth_restores_hidden_listings.details: Callback restores HIDDEN_PENDING_VERIFICATION listings to ACTIVE after verification

frontend_great_disconnect_card.details: Admin Settings shows 'The Great Disconnect' card with description and button

frontend_confirmation_dialog.details: window.confirm dialog appears with disconnect warning message

frontend_result_display.details: Result panel shows users_reset, tokens_deleted, listings_hidden after execution
